action.reasoning: Observation: v2 fixed-feature pipeline produced a large gain, hidden-test avg_precision 0.1500→0.1788, with validation ensemble AP 0.1787 and only 3 selected members, but the run took ~57 minutes including cache/training/eval. Analysis: this is now the strongest direction; since v2 feature caches already exist, additional seeds/configs or better ensemble weighting should be much cheaper than the first v2 run. Before launching another training/edit, I need inspect the v2 script/checkpoint metadata to see candidate APs, selected seeds, architecture, and whether existing best ensemble can be extended safely. Decision: run a compact metadata/code inspection for tabular_v2 and ensemble checkpoints, then train additional complementary v2 candidates next.
